title: Playbook Overview
text:
[Section: Playbook Overview]

Room title: Olist E-Commerce Operations Analytics
Generated from: olist_ecommerce_deployment_kit
Action plan playbook for the Olist e-commerce operations demo. Generated from the deployment kit metadata, enriched diagnostic tables, and Genie operating rules.

title: KPI Reference and How to Interpret Shifts
text:
[Section: KPI Reference and How to Interpret Shifts]

This playbook converts Genie diagnostics into operational recommendations for category performance, delivery reliability, customer review quality, and Pareto-based prioritization.
KPIs covered:
- total_order_value: Total merchandise/order value, excluding freight.
- order_count: Distinct order count.
- late_delivery_rate: Share of delivered orders arriving after estimated delivery.
- average_review_score: Average customer review score for reviewed orders.
- review_score_gap_late_vs_on_time: Observed review score gap between on-time and late delivered orders.
- late_delivery_rate_reduction_gap_to_4_2_review: Modeled reduction in late delivery rate needed to reach a 4.2 review score when feasible.
General interpretation rules:
- Always prioritize issues using both operational risk and business contribution.
- Use Pareto buckets to distinguish high-impact categories or states from long-tail noise.
- Treat target-gap fields as modeled what-if estimates, not causal proof.
- If on-time review scores are below 4.2, late-delivery reduction alone is insufficient.
- For review questions, check review coverage and avoid overinterpreting tiny segments.
- Grain context: See KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md Source Table section.
Metric view: workspace.olist_ecommerce.olist_order_metrics_mv
Underlying source: workspace.olist_ecommerce.olist_order_metrics_mv
Primary filters: order_id, customer_id, order_status, customer_city, customer_state, seller_city, seller_state, product_category

title: Scenario A - High-Value Category With Elevated Late Delivery
text:
[Section: Scenario A - High-Value Category With Elevated Late Delivery]

Symptoms:
- Product category has order_value_share above 1% and late_delivery_rate above 8%.
- Category appears in the Pareto top 80 percent of order value.
Likely causes:
- Fulfillment constraints in high-volume categories.
- Seller capacity mismatch for popular products.
- Freight network delays concentrated in a few seller or customer states.
Action plan recommendations:
1. Immediate actions (today-48h)
- Rank affected categories by order_value_share and late_delivery_rate.
- Split the category by seller_state and customer_state to isolate concentration.
- Check whether late orders also show lower review scores.
2. Short-term actions (1-4 weeks)
- Create seller outreach for high-value late-delivery categories.
- Review carrier handoff and shipping-limit patterns for the category.
- Monitor daily late_delivery_rate and review_score_gap_late_vs_on_time.
Measurement targets:
- Reduce late_delivery_rate for prioritized categories by 10-20% relative.
- Improve average_review_score or reduce review_score_gap_late_vs_on_time.

title: Scenario B - Late Delivery Strongly Affects Review Score
text:
[Section: Scenario B - Late Delivery Strongly Affects Review Score]

Symptoms:
- review_score_gap_late_vs_on_time is among the largest category gaps.
- avg_review_when_late is materially lower than avg_review_when_on_time.
Likely causes:
- Customer expectations are highly delivery-sensitive in this category.
- Long delivery times create dissatisfaction independent of product quality.
- Communication gaps around delayed delivery.
Action plan recommendations:
1. Immediate actions (today-48h)
- List categories by review_score_gap_late_vs_on_time descending.
- Separate categories where average_review_score is already below target.
- Inspect whether late deliveries are concentrated in specific customer states.
2. Short-term actions (1-4 weeks)
- Add proactive delay messaging for sensitive categories.
- Set delivery reliability targets for sellers in high-gap categories.
- Track avg_review_when_late and avg_review_when_on_time separately.
Measurement targets:
- Narrow review_score_gap_late_vs_on_time.
- Increase avg_review_when_late without degrading on-time order review scores.

title: Scenario C - Review Target Gap To 4.2
text:
[Section: Scenario C - Review Target Gap To 4.2]

Symptoms:
- late_delivery_rate_reduction_gap_to_4_2_review is positive and large.
- review_4_2_target_status is late_delivery_reduction_can_help.
Likely causes:
- Late delivery is a material lever for review improvement.
- A small number of categories may need disproportionate delivery improvement.
- Current late delivery rate exceeds modeled target rate.
Action plan recommendations:
1. Immediate actions (today-48h)
- Rank categories by late_delivery_rate_reduction_gap_to_4_2_review.
- Exclude categories where review_4_2_target_status says late delivery alone is insufficient.
- Pair each category with order_count to avoid overfitting small samples.
2. Short-term actions (1-4 weeks)
- Set category-specific late delivery thresholds.
- Review seller/carrier performance for the target-gap categories.
- Create dashboard alerts for categories drifting away from required late delivery rate.
Measurement targets:
- Move late_delivery_rate toward late_delivery_rate_needed_for_4_2_review.
- Increase average_review_score toward 4.2 while maintaining order volume.

title: Scenario D - Customer-State Pareto Concentration
text:
[Section: Scenario D - Customer-State Pareto Concentration]

Symptoms:
- A small set of customer states drives the Pareto top 80 percent of orders.
- One of those states also has low average_review_score or high late_delivery_rate.
Likely causes:
- Geographic demand concentration amplifies localized delivery issues.
- Carrier performance varies by destination state.
- Regional customer expectations differ.
Action plan recommendations:
1. Immediate actions (today-48h)
- Rank customer states by order_count_share and cumulative_order_count_share.
- Overlay late_delivery_rate and average_review_score for Pareto states.
- Identify whether issues are customer-state or seller-state driven.
2. Short-term actions (1-4 weeks)
- Prioritize operational review for Pareto states with poor review or delivery metrics.
- Create region-specific delivery improvement targets.
- Track state-level metrics in the AI/BI dashboard.
Measurement targets:
- Improve late_delivery_rate in Pareto states.
- Lift average_review_score for high-volume low-score states.

title: Action Card: Pareto Category Triage
text:
[Section: Action Card: Pareto Category Triage]

Trigger: A category is in pareto_top_80_value and has elevated late delivery.
Actions:
- Rank by order_value_share, then by late_delivery_rate.
- Check review_score_gap_late_vs_on_time before prioritizing.
- Create category-specific owner and target.
Expected impact: Focuses operations on segments with both business impact and customer risk.

title: Action Card: 4.2 Review Target Feasibility Check
text:
[Section: Action Card: 4.2 Review Target Feasibility Check]

Trigger: A stakeholder asks how to reach a 4.2 average review score.
Actions:
- Use review_4_2_target_status to determine feasibility.
- If feasible, use late_delivery_rate_reduction_gap_to_4_2_review.
- If infeasible, add non-delivery CX interventions.
Expected impact: Prevents overclaiming what delivery improvements alone can accomplish.

title: Action Card: Late Delivery Review Gap Drilldown
text:
[Section: Action Card: Late Delivery Review Gap Drilldown]

Trigger: review_score_gap_late_vs_on_time is high.
Actions:
- Compare avg_review_when_late and avg_review_when_on_time.
- Filter to categories with adequate order_count.
- Prioritize categories where late_delivery_rate is also high.
Expected impact: Identifies where delivery reliability most visibly affects customer satisfaction.

title: Example Plan 1 - Audio category has high late delivery and low late-order reviews
text:
[Section: Example Plan 1 - Audio category has high late delivery and low late-order reviews]

Observed trend: Audio appears with elevated late_delivery_rate and a large review_score_gap_late_vs_on_time.
Plan:
- Validate late delivery concentration by seller_state and customer_state.
- Create a seller/carrier follow-up list for delayed audio orders.
- Track late_delivery_rate, avg_review_when_late, and average_review_score weekly.
Success metrics: Late delivery rate falls, average late-order review score improves, and review score gap narrows.
